message:
feat(aegis): Galaxy-Brain UX, telemetry, and diagnostics integration (ft-l5em3.5)

Unified Aegis engine combining PAC-Bayesian backpressure (l5em3.3) and
entropy anomaly detection (l5em3.4) into a single diagnostic interface.

Components:
- AegisEngine: unified controller with observe_backpressure/observe_entropy
- OverlayCard: box-drawing terminal renderer for mathematical state
- AegisDump: full JSON export for `ft debug dump-aegis` (schema v1)
- AegisLogEvent: structured log streaming for observability
- InterventionEvent: ring-buffered intervention history
- Severity/entropy intuition functions for plain-English explanations

25 unit tests covering config serde, overlay rendering, dump export,
structured logging, intervention tracking, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
